title: X-tra Gooey Japanese Couscous Tonkotsu Ramen
description: A Japanese-inspired dish that combines the comforting flavors of Tonkotsu Ramen with the lightness of couscous and the crunch of ssam-wrap. Perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the tonkotsu broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Cook the couscous according to package instructions.
To assemble the ramen, place a spoonful of couscous in the bottom of a bowl.
Add a sheet of ssam-wrap on top of the couscous.
Ladle the hot tonkotsu broth over the ssam-wrap.
Add the cubed tofu and sliced green onions on top.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve immediately.
